title: peristrophe undulata
intro: Peristrophe undulata, also known as the 'Wish-Granting Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Peristrophe undulata are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are used to promote overall health and well-being.
